idea.raw_input: Add a settings feature in our budget tracker app, users can add or remove categories from there, categories for expenses and categories for income

overview.problem: Users cannot customize expense and income categories in the budget app — they are hardcoded in the models and add transaction screen.
overview.solution: Add a Settings screen accessible from the bottom nav where users can add new custom categories and remove existing ones for both expense and income types.
overview.target_user: Fortuna budget app users who want personalized category names for tracking their spending and income.
overview.success_metric: Users can add a custom category in Settings, see it reflected in the Add Transaction screen's category chips, and delete categories they no longer need.

screens.name: SettingsScreen
screens.purpose: Allow users to view, add, and remove custom expense and income categories.

features.name: View categorized lists in settings
features.description: Settings screen displays two sections: Expense Categories and Income Categories. Each section shows the default categories (from BudgetGoalsModel) plus any user-added custom categories.
acceptance_criteria: Given the Settings screen is opened, when it loads, then both Expense and Income category sections are visible with their default categories listed.
Given custom categories exist in SharedPreferences, when Settings screen loads, then custom categories appear alongside defaults in the correct section.

features.name: Add custom category
features.description: User can add a new category by typing a name and tapping Add. The category is saved to SharedPreferences and immediately visible in the list.
acceptance_criteria: Given the user enters a non-empty category name and taps Add, when the action completes, then the new category appears in the list and is persisted to SharedPreferences.
Given the user tries to add a duplicate category name, when they tap Add, then the category is not added (no duplicates).
Given the user tries to add an empty category name, when they tap Add, then nothing happens.

features.name: Delete custom category
features.description: User can delete a custom (non-default) category by tapping a delete icon next to it. Default categories cannot be deleted.
acceptance_criteria: Given a custom category is displayed, when the user taps the delete icon, then the category is removed from the list and from SharedPreferences.
Given a default category is displayed, when the list is rendered, then no delete icon is shown next to it.
Given only default categories exist, when the Settings screen is displayed, then no delete buttons are visible.

features.name: Categories reflected in Add Transaction screen
features.description: Custom expense categories from Settings should appear as category chips in the AddTransactionScreen alongside defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Given a custom expense category exists, when AddTransactionScreen is opened, then the new category appears as a selectable chip.
Given a custom category is deleted in Settings, when AddTransactionScreen is opened, then that category no longer appears.

data.backend_notes: All category data stored in SharedPreferences. No backend needed.

state_management.justification: Existing app uses Provider with ChangeNotifier.

navigation.justification: Existing app uses go_router with ShellRoute.

observability.justification: Small app, no remote observability needed.

tickets.title: Create CategorySettingsModel
acceptance_criteria: Loads from SharedPreferences on init
addExpenseCategory appends if not duplicate and saves
removeExpenseCategory removes if exists and saves
Same methods for income categories
Default categories excluded from delete operations

tickets.title: Create CategoryListItem widget
acceptance_criteria: Displays category name
Shows delete IconButton when isDeletable is true
Hides delete button when isDeletable is false
Calls onDelete callback

tickets.title: Create SettingsScreen
acceptance_criteria: Two sections: Expense and Income
TextField + Add button per section
Add with non-empty text adds category
Add with empty text does no-ops
Defaults shown without delete
Custom shown with delete
Delete removes via model
Reactive updates via Consumer

tickets.title: Add Settings tab to router
acceptance_criteria: 5th tab with Icons.settings
Navigates to /settings
SettingsScreen registered in ShellRoute

tickets.title: Register model in main.dart and wire to AddTransactionScreen
acceptance_criteria: CategorySettingsModel provided in main.dart
AddTransactionScreen reads CategorySettingsModel
Custom categories appear as chips
Deleted categories disappear from chips

removeExpenseCategory removes if exists and saves
Default categories excluded from delete operations
Shows delete IconButton when isDeletable is true
Hides delete button when isDeletable is false
